response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and geospatial projects (GISCollective) but lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in a commercial routing/navigation context. Their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, distributed systems, and AI-agent infrastructure, with only incidental use of C/C++ and no clear exposure to low-latency geospatial data processing or routing tiling pipelines.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) demonstrating problem-solving in navigation-related domains
Proven ability to learn and adapt across multiple languages and technologies (C++, D, Rust-adjacent in personal projects)
Experience with distributed systems, high-performance I/O, and real-time data processing (Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production environments for routing/navigation systems
Limited exposure to Linux server applications and distributed system concepts specific to routing pipelines
Most recent work focuses on web/AI-agent technologies rather than low-latency geospatial data processing
